sizing_rule.note: Trade fixed contracts scaled by (Account Equity / Threshold ÷ Portfolio Weighting). Example: 1 contract per $2,436.69 equity for 100-share contracts. Uses optimal f divided by portfolio weighting for multi-instrument portfolios. Specific f value not disclosed by author.

source_rule_text: Trade a fixed number of contracts scaled to account equity based on the optimal f value divided by portfolio weighting
